page.title: Context
page.lead: <mark class="docs-highlight">Context</mark> unifies <mark class="docs-highlight">Request</mark> and <mark class="docs-highlight">Response</mark> into a single API for middlewares and handlers.

accessors.title: Reading request data
accessors.description: Use <mark class="docs-highlight">context.headers</mark>, <mark class="docs-highlight">context.params</mark>, <mark class="docs-highlight">context.query</mark>, and <mark class="docs-highlight">context.remoteAddress</mark> to read input data.

bodyCookiesSession.title: Body, cookies, and session
bodyCookiesSession.description: With <mark class="docs-highlight">context.body</mark>, <mark class="docs-highlight">context.cookies</mark>, and <mark class="docs-highlight">context.session</mark> you can access payload, cookies, and active session.

reqRes.title: Direct access to req and res
reqRes.description: If you need detailed control, you can use <mark class="docs-highlight">context.req</mark> and <mark class="docs-highlight">context.res</mark>.
reqRes.tip: Prefer <mark class="docs-highlight">context</mark> helpers for most cases and use <mark class="docs-highlight">res</mark> when you need advanced customization.

filesStreamRender.title: Files, stream, and render
filesStreamRender.description: You can also respond with files, streams, or views using <mark class="docs-highlight">context.download()</mark>, <mark class="docs-highlight">context.sendFile()</mark>, <mark class="docs-highlight">context.stream()</mark>, and <mark class="docs-highlight">context.render()</mark>.
filesStreamRender.danger: Before using <mark class="docs-highlight">context.sendFile()</mark> or <mark class="docs-highlight">context.download()</mark>, validate paths to avoid exposing sensitive files.
